# textureCubeMap

**Instance Property**

The texture to apply to the skybox.

## Declaration

```swift
var textureCubeMap: GLKEffectPropertyTexture { get }
```

## Discussion

Your application should create a complete texture cube map in its initialization code. Then, assign the name of this texture to the [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKSkyboxEffect/textureCubeMap] property of the skybox object.

```objc
skyboxEffect.textureCubeMap.glName = texture_name;
```

## Configuring the Skybox

- **center**: The center of the skybox.
- **xSize**: The width of the skybox.
- **ySize**: The height of the skybox.
- **zSize**: The depth of the skybox.
title: textureCubeMap
